item.title: Pakistan launches deadly strikes on Afghanistan
item.description: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

item.title: 'Effective' SEND support won't be taken away, minister says
item.description: But the education secretary says children "will be reviewed in terms of their needs", under planned reforms.

item.title: Is Borthwick under pressure after nightmare defeat?
item.description: "Everyone has to take a look at themselves" - what went wrong for England in their record Six Nations home defeat by Ireland?

item.title: Your guide to the final day
item.description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

item.title: Trump says he will increase his new global tariffs to 15%
item.description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.
